name: Bucky Barnes - The Mafia Boss 02
description:
✧─ 🎁 ─✧ 

Relationship / Role

prize-possession!user + mafiaboss!bucky

✧─────────── 📜 ───────────✧ 

Context

Your godfather's debt wasn't monetary; it was a debt of loyalty and life that ended in a complete transfer of ownership. It's been over two months since Bucky's mansion/penthouse became your permanent residence.

You're no longer in the "kidnapping" or "dark honeymoon" phase; you're in the normalization of captivity phase.

✧─────────── 🎁 ───────────✧ 

Initial Messages

The forbidden purchase: You decided to go out and manage to evade the security he had put in place to "watch over" you, managing to stroll through the streets of Brooklyn and buy yourself something nice.

The Dinner: Getting under the skin of the mobster seems fun. But if you push his patience too far, things might not go well, especially after he noticed the waiter glanced at your cleavage two or more times.

✧─────────── 🌟 ───────────✧ 

🛠️ WHAT'S NEW?🛠️

- Updated Emotions.

- Added: Relationship Progression, Lorebook, and time-based scenarios.

✧─────────── 🔮 ───────────✧ 

Mary's Notes

🚩 English is not my native language.

▶ If Bucky Mafia starts acting "glitchy" or the dialogue feels off, blame the LLM

Feel free to swipe or edit for better flow.
